page_content: EDCP879 Internship in School Counseling (4-8 Credits) Apprentice practice under professional supervision in an area of competence compatible with the student's professional goals. Credit not to be granted for experience accrued prior to registration. Open only to degree- and certiﬁcate-seeking graduate students. Restriction: Permission of EDUC-Counseling, Higher Education and Special Education department. Repeatable to: 9 credits. Credit Only Granted for: EDCP888G or EDCP879. Formerly: EDCP888G.
